recommendations.title: Dreamkatcher

recommendations.title: Corrective Measures
recommendations.overview: Set in San Tiburon, the world's most dangerous maximum-security penitentiary and home to the world's most treacherous superpowered criminals, where tensions among the inmates and staff heighten, leading to anarchy that engulfs the prison and order is

recommendations.title: What We Become
recommendations.overview: A family of four is quarantined in their home as a virulent strand of the flu spreads into town and they are forced to the extreme to escape alive.

recommendations.title: The Brass Teapot
recommendations.overview: When a couple discovers that a brass teapot makes them money whenever they hurt themselves, they must come to terms with how far they are willing to go.

recommendations.title: It Lives Inside
recommendations.overview: Desperate to fit in at school, Sam rejects her Indian culture and family to be like everyone else. However, when a mythological demonic spirit latches onto her former best friend, she must come to terms with her heritage to defeat it.

recommendations.title: 3 Generations
recommendations.overview: A teenager transitions from female to male, and his family must come to terms with that fact.

recommendations.title: The King of Algiers

recommendations.title: Yours, Mine and Ours
recommendations.overview: When a widower with ten children marries a widow with eight, can the twenty of them ever come together as one big happy family?

recommendations.title: The Last Will and Testament of Rosalind Leigh

recommendations.title: The Open House
recommendations.overview: A teenager and his mother find themselves besieged by threatening forces when they move into a new house.
